subject: Kakuna — yellow hexagonal cocoon Pokemon with small arm-like protrusions, hanging from a branch in a green forested setting
description: A hard-shelled yellow hexagonal cocoon hangs at the center of the image against a blurred green background suggesting foliage. The shell is faceted into angular segments and has a pair of small stubby protrusions on either side near the middle. The overall form is geometric and compact. The green background is warm and leafy. The creature appears entirely inert, suspended in place — no visible limbs, no face (only a faint suggestion of features), consistent with the flavor text describing an immobile transitional stage.
foreground: yellow hexagonal faceted cocoon with small side protrusions
